response.justification: Bogdan is a strong generalist software engineer with 17+ years of production experience and a solid TypeScript/Node.js background, but the resume reveals only roughly one year of any AI/agent-adjacent work (current role, April 2025 onward) centered on MCP tooling rather than end-to-end GenAI system design. The role demands 8+ years building AI-driven solutions, deep RAG and vector-database expertise, multi-agent framework experience, and Python proficiency — none of which are substantiated in the resume. The engineering fundamentals are solid, but the AI specialization gap is too large for a Staff-level forward-deployed GenAI role.
strengths: MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure at current re:cinq role demonstrates early, relevant GenAI tooling exposure
Staff-level TypeScript/Node.js engineering with demonstrated production scale (millions of HTTP requests/s at Dunnhumby, millions of mail pieces at Optilyz)
AWS CDK experience and broad cloud-adjacent delivery history across multiple industries
concerns: AI/GenAI experience is limited to approximately one year and does not approach the required 8+ years of building production AI-driven solutions
Python is entirely absent from the resume; it is listed as a primary language for the role alongside TypeScript
No evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI, or equivalents)
